# MCP Lifecycle Operator — knowledge

## fact
- [MCP Lifecycle Operator overview](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/fact-mcp-lifecycle-operator-overview.md) — Kubernetes operator (kubernetes-sigs) providing declarative MCPServer CRD for deploying and managing MCP servers — bundled in RHOAI operator for 3.5, used by MCP Catalog and MCP Registry.
- [MCPServer CRD technical details](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/fact-mcpserver-crd.md) — The MCPServer custom resource (mcp.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1) -- spec fields, auto-created resources, status conditions, and discovery URL pattern.

## person
- [Ju Lim](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/person-ju-lim.md) — Sr. Manager, Product Management, Hybrid Platforms -- drives OCP5 Intelligent Platform / applied AI story, MCPLO productization, RHOAI Limited packaging.

## qa
- [Does the MCP Lifecycle Operator have dependencies or deploy servers by default?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/qa-mcplo-dependencies-defaults.md) — Field QA -- MCPLO has no Gateway dependency, deploys no servers by default, supports Day 2 server additions via catalog or CRDs.
- [Where do MCPLO docs live and who qualifies it?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/qa-mcplo-documentation-qualification.md) — Field QA -- documentation lives in RHOAI docs (not OCP docs); qualification is joint between OCP team (functional) and RHOAI team (deployment/integration).
- [How is the MCP Lifecycle Operator distributed and installed?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/qa-mcplo-installation-distribution.md) — Field QA -- MCPLO is bundled with RHOAI operator (not standalone OLM), disconnected via RHOAI offline bundle, updates via RHOAI releases. Upstream available for BYO.

## question
- [How is the MCP server catalog delivered to disconnected customers?](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/question-disconnected-catalog-delivery.md) — Open -- no oc-mirror equivalent for MCP catalog in disconnected mode has been defined yet.
- [OLS transition to MCPLO-deployed OCP MCP server](/features/mcp-lifecycle-operator/knowledge/question-ols-mcplo-transition.md) — Open -- OLS currently uses its own internal OCP MCP server; when MCPLO is productized, OLS will ask users to install via MCPLO. Transition plan and subscription implications unclear.
